# مقايضة (Maqayada)

> منصة سعودية متخصصة في مقارنة عروض التمويل العقاري ومتابعة المستشارين الماليين المعتمدين.
> A Saudi Arabic-language platform for comparing home-financing offers and tracking certified financial advisors.

## Primary Audience
Arabic-speaking individuals in Saudi Arabia seeking home financing, mortgage comparison, and guidance from certified advisors.

## Language
Arabic (primary), site UI is fully Arabic.

## Key Public Pages

- Home / Landing: https://maqayada.com/
- Annual Offers (عروض سنوية): https://maqayada.com/annual-offers
- Advisor Standards (معايير المستشارين): https://maqayada.com/advisor-standards
- Disclaimer (إخلاء المسؤولية): https://maqayada.com/disclaimer
- Privacy Policy (سياسة الخصوصية): https://maqayada.com/privacy
- Terms of Use (شروط الاستخدام): https://maqayada.com/terms

## What This Site Covers
- Comparison of Saudi home-financing and mortgage offers from certified advisors
- Standards and credentials required for financial advisors on the platform
- Legal disclosures, privacy policy, and terms of use
- User portal for submitting and tracking financing requests

## What This Site Does Not Cover
- Real estate listings or property sales
- Banking services directly
- Non-Saudi markets
